summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 Properties & Units page merge. All 11 specified features tested successfully with 100% pass rate. Properties and Units pages have been successfully merged into a single page with expandable sections. Navigation, CRUD operations, UI interactions, and Features page documentation all working perfectly.
passed_tests: Sidebar navigation has exactly 7 items (Properties, Tenants, Leads, Income, Vacancy, Calendar, Features)
No standalone Units page link found (correctly removed)
Properties page shows property cards with name, address, unit count badge
Property cards display unit number badges with sizes (e.g., Studio (0/1), T (2/1), B (2/1))
Property Details expandable section shows owner/manager info, phone, email, parking, pets toggle with notes, amenities
Units expandable section shows complete table with Unit #, Size, Base Rent, Add'l Costs, Available From, Close Date, Actions columns
Add Property button opens dialog with all required form fields (name, address, owner info, pets toggle, amenities)
Add Unit button (inside expanded units section) opens dialog with all required fields (number, size select, rent, dates)
Property edit functionality - edit dialog opens correctly with pre-filled data
Property and unit delete buttons present and accessible
Units table displays complete unit data with proper formatting and edit/delete actions
Navigation to all other pages works (Tenants, Leads, Income, Vacancy, Calendar, Features)
Features page updated with correct 'Properties & Units Management' section describing combined functionality
All expandable sections work smoothly with proper animations
CRUD dialogs have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Property Details section shows complete owner information, contact details, parking, pets, and amenities
Units section includes Add Unit button and full table functionality
